ModMetaData.name: Yet Another Research Tree (YART)
ModMetaData.author: SeoHyeon
ModMetaData.description:
Yet Another Research Tree (YART) replaces the vanilla research tab with a custom, graph-based tech tree.
Features - Automatic graph layout of all research, including projects and tabs added by other mods. - Smooth zoom and pan with custom rendering and level-of-detail node cards. - Per-channel research queue with drag-to-reorder (vanilla bench, Anomaly knowledge, and more). - Fast search by research name, unlocked content, description, or @mod. - Unified view that merges every research category into one tree — or browse per tab. - Switch back to the vanilla research window at any time.
Compatibility - Honors other mods' research requirements automatically through the vanilla CanStartNow path (e.g. Rimedieval, Medieval Overhaul). - World Tech Level: hides research above the world's tech level. - Vanilla Gravship Expanded: shows Gravtech research as its own channel. - Semi Random Research (Unofficial and Progression Fork): its "Go to Tech Tree" button opens YART.
Requires Harmony. Works with the base game and all official DLCs.
